# MuleSoft SAP SuccessFactors Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (5.0) of SAP SuccessFactors Connector documentation.
> See [SAP SuccessFactors Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-successfactors-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the SAP SuccessFactors Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [SAP SuccessFactors Connector 5.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-successfactors-connector/latest/index.md)
- [SAP SuccessFactors 5.0 - Additional Configuration Information](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-successfactors-connector/latest/sap-successfactors-connector-config-topics.md)
- [SAP SuccessFactors Connector 5.0 - Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-successfactors-connector/latest/sap-successfactors-connector-examples.md)
- [SAP SuccessFactors Connector 5.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-successfactors-connector/latest/sap-successfactors-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure SAP SuccessFactors Connector 5.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-successfactors-connector/latest/sap-successfactors-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating SAP SuccessFactors Connector to Version 5.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-successfactors-connector/latest/sap-successfactors-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [SAP SuccessFactors Connector 5.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-successfactors-connector/latest/sap-successfactors-connector-xml-maven.md)
